rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. MEI LING FANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Quashing Subpoena Duces Tecum As To Legal Associates, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 7, 2020 line 1. THIRD PARTY LEGAL ASSOCIATES INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Quashing Subpoena Duces Tecum As To Legal Associates, Inc. is DENIED. Sanctions granted in the amount of $5,750 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM PUCKETTT VS. LUCY B. HUNGATE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 7, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT LUCY HUNGATE MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARK A. KELEHER ET AL VS. MARK PETER KRINSKY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Mark Krinsky Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 7, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT MARK KRINSKY Defendant Mark Krinsky Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration is continued to October 16,2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID TSAO VS. GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant General Tso Kitchen Inc.'S Notice Of Motion For Issue, Evidence, Terminating, And/Or Monetary Sanctions For Discovery Misuse Against Plaintiff David Tsao And Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 7, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. Defendant General Tso Kitchen Inc.'S Notice Of Motion For Issue, Evidence, Terminating, And/Or Monetary Sanctions For Discovery Misuse Against Plaintiff David Tsao And Counsel is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005. On September 28, 2020 parties reported that possession was no longer at issue in this matter. This matter is not subject to unlawful detainer timelines and procedures. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TOWER VALET PARKING, INC. VS. K9 PLAYTIME, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 7, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT K9 PLAYTIME, INC. MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS Hearing Required. Process server and William Tappe to be present and ready to provide testimony. =(501/CFH)
